jobs.Full Stack Developer: Looking for a seasoned Full Stack Developer. Must have deep expertise in React, MongoDB, Express, and Node.js. Bonus points for AWS, Docker, and TypeScript.
jobs.Frontend Developer: UI/UX focused Frontend Developer. Tech stack: React, TypeScript, Redux, Node.js (basics), and TailwindCSS. Experience with Framer Motion expected.
jobs.Backend Developer: We need a robust Backend Developer. Focus primarily on Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, Redis, and System Design patterns. Docker experience is required.
jobs.Data Analyst: Seeking a Data Analyst Data Scientist hybrid. Requirements: Python, SQL, Tableau, Pandas, and Advanced Statistics. R or Machine Learning is a plus.
